name: Elder Koa
dialogue: The cave behind me eats trainers who aren’t ready.
I lost three friends in there — still hear them sometimes when the wind sits right.
Prove you can stand the gauntlet, and I’ll let you pass.
preBattleLine: Koa removes his hat. The clearing falls silent. His team forms a shield.
postDefeatDialogue: Pass, then. You’ve earned the path.
The Five Pillars Dojo lies beyond the cave. Five masters guard the throne — fire, ice, shadow, stone, and wind.
Every trainer in this forest talks about it. None of them have beaten it.
You might be the one. Are you tuff enough?
The cave will test what the forest only suggested. Bring more potions than you think you need.
